title: Relationships in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger relationships in practice judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Relationships in Practice is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Relationships in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good relationships in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Relationships in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
